🚀 By the end of 2026, the financial services industry will be re-segmented not by who adopted AI, but who made it work in practice

🔹 The finance function is undergoing rapid transformation, driven by new technologies, shifting risks, and evolving priorities, with AI and automation being key skills for the next fiscal year

🔹 Financial institutions are facing industrialized deception and synthetic fraud, with AI-powered fraud trends on the rise, making AI-driven transaction monitoring crucial for fraud and risk management

🔹 Nearly every financial institution plans to increase or maintain AI budgets, with open source models and AI agents fueling a surge in adoption, and leaders like Bank of America and Goldman Sachs already making significant strides in AI integration

🚀 Did you know that 89% of leaders say tech investments fall short, despite AI transforming operations?

🔹 Companies like SAP and UiPath are leading the charge in AI automation, with SAP's AI agents and UiPath's shift from pilots to scaled AI automation

🔹 From contact center automation to ERP AI use cases, AI is rebooting businesses and transforming the future of work
